texto: A trance healer in Bali, an eagle woman, asked me, 'What is freedom, madam?' She had a chained eagle, her ally in healing, and it broke my heart, those huge, folded wings. So I asked her why the eagle couldn't fly free, why it was chained. And then her eagle eyes dug into mine, and she asked, 'What is freedom, madam?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Alma Luz Villanueva que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “A trance healer in Bali, an eagle woman, asked me, 'What is freedom, madam?' She had a chained ea…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, freedom, villanueva, com foco em villanueva.
